surprised: The mission directive presupposed VAJRA infrastructure that verifiably does not exist in the cloud repo.

evidence_strengthened: VAJRA-absent finding (2026-07-17 inventory) re-confirmed by branch/PR scan.
always_repeat: Reconcile directive against verified repository reality before building.

surprised: Nothing material; execution was mechanical spec work.
evidence_strengthened: Observation substrate now exists (schemas, storage, validation, confidence model).
never_repeat: Presuming a runtime/language for VAJRA (kept it language-neutral instead).
always_repeat: Assert only structural invariants; keep every empirical value UNKNOWN.

evidence_strengthened: Bridge/memory/loop specified; reuses ERE substrate (rule ids cross-verified).
always_repeat: Verify-before-trust on every bundle; append-only supersession.

next_mission: Institute executive decision discipline; stop building against the boundary.

surprised: The binding constraint has been identical (Windows access) for 3 straight cycles while output volume kept rising — a signal that further spec-building is low Founder value.
assumption_failed: That continuing to produce specifications was the best use of a cycle.
evidence_strengthened: Canonical Research Gate (5 preconditions) now makes Alpha Campaign 2 objectively blockable.
never_repeat: Manufacturing cycles against an unreleased constraint.
always_repeat: Run the value test; if nothing improves, surface the constraint and stop.

bottleneck: Windows READ access — the SOLE remaining constraint; all 5 research-gate preconditions are downstream of it.
next_mission: Founder releases Windows READ access. Governor should NOT open a new build cycle until then.

surprised: A full trading-session mandate arrived while the binding constraint (Windows access) stayed unreleased for a 5th cycle.
assumption_failed: That a supervised paper session could run — the system to supervise is absent.
evidence_strengthened: Pre-registered trade-journal + supervision protocol now make future sessions rigorous; integrity guard exercised (Governor STOPPED, refused to fabricate).
never_repeat: Simulating a session over absent/synthetic data and presenting it as real (would fabricate scientific evidence).
always_repeat: Run the Trade Gate first; if the system is absent, STOP before trade zero and report honestly.

bottleneck: Windows READ access / a real read-only market-data feed — still the sole constraint.

decision: Productivity measured ONLY by verified observations/experiments/learning/decisions — not commits, specs, protocols, or docs. Entered Scientific Standby.
blocker_status: Constraint unchanged. Awaiting evidence source (Windows READ access or a read-only market-data feed).
auto_transition: On availability of verified observations -> EXPERIMENT SUPERVISION MODE, no redesign required (paper-trading supervision protocol + trade-journal already in place).
note: Governor will NOT repeatedly recommend the same blocker. This is the single standing record.

mission: Governor Ω Runtime Context Foundation — one Governor, discover before plan
executed: Ran discover_runtime.py in-environment and produced a VERIFIED capability registry (first mission actually executed, not specified).
surprised: The boot probe exposed a fault in my OWN instrument: internet_access read UNAVAILABLE while github_auth PASSED and vercel/supabase TCP connected — an internally inconsistent reading from a bad HTTP-HEAD probe.
assumption_failed: That a HEAD request is a reliable connectivity probe behind the agent egress proxy (it returns 400).
evidence_strengthened: Runtime reality now evidence-backed: Linux container/root/newspulse-ai; AVAILABLE = fs(rw), git(rw), github_auth, python, node, docker, systemd, internet; UNAVAILABLE = powershell, vajra_repository, market_data, broker.
never_repeat: Shipping a probe reading that is internally inconsistent without correcting the instrument.
always_repeat: Discover+verify runtime before planning; fix the instrument when it disagrees with itself (Root Cause before Repair).
execution_confidence_delta: none re: market execution (vajra/market/broker still UNAVAILABLE)
organizational_readiness_delta: + real (Governor now knows where it runs and what it can actually do)
decision: Unify Windows/Cloud Governor into one Governor Ω that plans only with AVAILABLE capabilities; VAJRA ops require a runtime context where vajra_repository is AVAILABLE.
next_mission: Await a runtime context where VAJRA is reachable, or the next Founder directive. No new build cycle otherwise.

mission: VAJRA Learning System — design & implement a scientific Learning OS
executed: Implemented a dependency-free Python Learning OS (5 engines) and ran its test suite: 14/14 unit+integration+e2e PASS; example cycle runs end-to-end.
surprised: Nothing material; this mission was genuinely data-independent and executable (unlike the VAJRA-access missions), so it produced verified artifacts, not specs.
evidence_strengthened: A real, tested instrument now exists: anti-overfit gate (in-sample+OOS), append-only lesson ledger, Founder Protected-Zone guard (daily_loss_limit etc. cannot auto-apply) — all proven by passing tests.
never_repeat: Claiming validation methods are implemented when only significance+OOS are (README states the limitation honestly).
always_repeat: For data-independent build asks, ship real tested code and prove it green; keep the ledger EMPTY (no fabricated lessons).
execution_confidence_delta: none re: market (0 real observations; fixtures synthetic by design)
organizational_readiness_delta: + real (a governed, testable learning instrument now exists, ready to ingest real observations via the ERE schemas)
decision: Learning kept independent from Memory/Governor/Execution; Protected Zone enforced in code; ledger append-only.
next_mission: Await real observations (VAJRA reachable) to feed the Learning OS, or the next Founder directive.
